paper_title: Gut Microbiota and FBPE Effects on T2DM

methods.description: This method involves extracting and analyzing genomic DNA from colon contents to study the gut microbiota composition and diversity using sequencing and bioinformatics tools.

steps.description: Total genomic DNA was extracted from colon contents using the Fast SPIN extraction kits.
steps.searchable_summary: extract genomic DNA from colon contents using Fast SPIN kits

steps.description: The quantity and quality of extracted DNA were measured using a NanoDrop ND-1000 spectrophotometer and agarose gel electrophoresis.
steps.searchable_summary: measure DNA quantity and quality using NanoDrop and gel electrophoresis

steps.description: PCR amplification of the bacterial 16S rRNA genes V3-V4 hypervariable regions.
steps.searchable_summary: amplify 16S rRNA genes V3-V4 regions using PCR

steps.description: The product was subjected to fluorescence quantification using Quant-iT PicoGreen dsDNA Assay Kit and a microplate reader.
steps.searchable_summary: quantify PCR product using PicoGreen assay and microplate reader

steps.description: Sequencing was performed using Illumina's MiSeq platform.
steps.searchable_summary: perform sequencing using Illumina MiSeq platform

steps.description: The QIIME pipeline was employed for bioinformatics analysis to calculate the diversity index.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze sequencing data using QIIME to calculate diversity index

steps.description: Non-metric multidimensional scaling (NMDS) examined the abundance and diversity of the OTUs.
steps.searchable_summary: perform NMDS to examine OTU abundance and diversity

methods.description: This method evaluates the effects of FBPE on serum biochemical parameters in T2DM mice, focusing on lipid metabolism and liver function indicators.

steps.description: Analyze serum biochemical parameters to assess lipid metabolism disorder indicators such as TC, TG, LDL-C, and HDL-C.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze serum for lipid metabolism indicators

steps.description: Evaluate liver function indicators such as ALP, AST, and ALT activity in serum.
steps.searchable_summary: evaluate liver function indicators in serum

methods.description: This method assesses the effects of FBPE on liver biochemical parameters in T2DM mice, focusing on lipid accumulation, insulin sensitivity, and oxidative stress.

steps.description: Evaluate liver lipid accumulation by measuring TC and TG levels.
steps.searchable_summary: measure liver TC and TG levels

steps.description: Assess insulin sensitivity by measuring hepatic glycogen levels.
steps.searchable_summary: measure hepatic glycogen levels for insulin sensitivity

steps.description: Evaluate oxidative stress by measuring SOD and GSH-Px activity and MDA levels.
steps.searchable_summary: measure SOD, GSH-Px activity, and MDA levels for oxidative stress

methods.description: This method involves examining the histopathological changes in liver and adipose tissues of T2DM mice to assess the protective effects of FBPE.

steps.description: Examine liver tissue for histopathological changes such as hepatocyte hypertrophy and inflammatory cell infiltration.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze liver tissue for histopathological changes

steps.description: Examine adipose tissue for changes in adipocyte size and distribution.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze adipose tissue for adipocyte size and distribution
